notes: Congressional and policy figures require periodic manual updates as bills move through Congress; dollar amounts are not reliably machine-readable from bill text. Scenario adjustments below are illustrative, user-adjustable assumptions about geopolitical/economic conditions, not sourced figures. V2 adds a CBO current-law baseline entry, which is already denominated in outlays (like the app's target series) rather than budget authority, so it doesn't have the appropriation-to-outlay timing mismatch that a discretionary/mandatory appropriations figure has.

appropriations.label: FY2026 enacted Defense Appropriations Act + reconciliation defense funding
appropriations.note: The $150B reconciliation figure (P.L. 119-21, 2025) is technically available FY2025-FY2029; commonly summed with the FY2026 appropriations act by press coverage as an approximate $1T FY2026 total. Treat as approximate. This is budget authority, not outlays.

appropriations.label: CBO February 2026 current-law baseline (National Defense outlays, function 050)
appropriations.note: Reported via secondary coverage of CBO's February 2026 Budget and Economic Outlook; already denominated in outlays, so directly comparable to this app's target series. The enacted appropriations figure above still wins for FY2026 since it has a higher legislative-stage weight, but this entry anchors FY2027+ growth via the inflation-based baseline assumption below.

appropriations.label: CBO baseline estimate (National Defense outlays, grown at CBO's projected ~2.5% near-term inflation rate)
appropriations.note: CBO's standard baseline convention extends discretionary spending at the rate of inflation absent new caps or legislation. CBO's Feb 2026 outlook did not have a separately reported FY2027 National Defense dollar figure available in this session, so this is derived from the FY2026 CBO baseline ($885.0B) grown by CBO's published near-term PCE inflation projection (~2.5%). Treat as an approximation, not a directly reported CBO figure.

appropriations.label: CBO baseline estimate (National Defense outlays, grown at CBO's projected ~2.3% inflation rate)
appropriations.note: Derived the same way as the FY2027 CBO baseline entry above (FY2027 estimate grown by ~2.3%, CBO's published inflation glide path toward 2% by 2030). Treat as an approximation.

appropriations.label: President's FY2027 budget request (Department of War)
